entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: '表一'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key '表一' → 表一 entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (表一) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Item). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "Unnamed: 3". Attach remarks columns [':', 'Unnamed: 5', 'Unnamed: 4', '2004/05年、2009/10年及2014/15年的住戶每月平均開支比較'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '表一' defines the root entity (表一).
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
